responseMessageContents.text:
Here are the verified dates, checked live on GitHub just now:

## Your app's timeline

```text
DAY STARTED:       March 1, 2026 (02:34 UTC)
                   → ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest created
                   → this is the true start day of your app (~4.5 months ago)
LAST PUSH:         July 9, 2026 (18:12 UTC) — most recent code push
TODAY / AUDIT DAY: July 10, 2026 — the audits we've been running this session
```

## About `rork-testing-app-311`

- `gh repo clone ibb142/rork-testing-app-311` → still **404 Not Found** on GitHub. It doesn't exist publicly (or is private), so it has **no start date** and is **not** where your app began.
- Your app did not start there. It started March 1, 2026 in `rork-global-real-estate-invest` — the repo that's synced into this workspace and deployed live at api.ivxholding.com.

So: **start day = March 1, 2026 · audit day = today, July 10, 2026 · total ≈ 4 months 9 days of development.**

If `rork-testing-app-311` is private and you want me to verify its date, make it public temporarily and I'll check it instantly.
